_meta.description: Submantle identity signatures — community-curated process recognition
_meta.format: Each signature matches processes by executable name, parent hints, file patterns, and command-line patterns

signatures.name: ComfyUI (Image Generation)
signatures.description: AI image generation pipeline — likely has unsaved generations in progress

signatures.name: Stable Diffusion WebUI
signatures.description: AI image generation pipeline with web interface

signatures.name: Ollama (Local LLM Server)
signatures.description: Local large language model server — may be serving active requests

signatures.name: Visual Studio Code
signatures.description: Code editor — may have unsaved files

signatures.name: Node.js Development Server
signatures.description: Development server — killing disrupts active development workflow

signatures.name: Node.js Process
signatures.description: Generic Node.js process — check before terminating

signatures.name: Docker Engine
signatures.description: Container engine — stopping affects all running containers

signatures.name: Jupyter Notebook
signatures.description: Interactive notebook — likely has unsaved cell outputs and state

signatures.name: FFmpeg (Media Processing)
signatures.description: Media encoding/processing — interrupting loses progress on long renders

signatures.name: Blender (3D Creation)
signatures.description: 3D creation suite — may have unsaved work or active render

signatures.name: OBS Studio (Streaming/Recording)
signatures.description: Live streaming or recording — killing causes immediate content loss

signatures.name: Google Chrome
signatures.description: Web browser — may have unsaved form data or active sessions

signatures.name: Qdrant Vector Database
signatures.description: Vector database — unclean shutdown may corrupt data

signatures.name: PostgreSQL Database
signatures.description: Production database — unclean shutdown risks data loss

signatures.name: Claude Code (AI Agent)
signatures.description: AI coding agent — may be mid-task with pending changes
